buckets.label: Aquatic Life
buckets.description: Fish, turtles, crustaceans, mollusks, and other aquatic animals.

buckets.label: Aquatic Habitats
buckets.description: Aquarium tanks, aquatic plants, coral, shells, and other habitat elements.

buckets.label: Aquarium Care
buckets.description: Aquarium tools, health, water handling, and maintenance equipment.

buckets.label: Nautical Items
buckets.description: Boats, navigation, safety gear, and sea-adjacent objects.

buckets.label: Maker and Lab
buckets.description: Workshop, field-science, instrumentation, and oddball maker icons.

buckets.label: Office Items
buckets.description: Office supplies, deskside hardware, and workplace objects in a glossy sticker style.
